calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-19-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-19-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Chuck Dahud, also present.
No appearance by the Defendant: Mark Williams.
09:40 am. - Plaintiff: Chuck Dahud, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Three day notice dtd. 5-31-04--------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 41 Jones St., #310, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $616.00
Costs per cost bill.
For the total of $616.00
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PTJ: Peter Hadiaris, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, Not reported.
Appearances:
Plaintiff: Chuck Dahud, present with counsel: David Mendez, Esq.
Defendant: Mark Williams, present in pro per.
The case did not settle, to Jury trial on Monday, July 19, 2004.
